title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 269.100 - Duration of permits
text:
269.100.  Duration of permits. — All vehicle permits and substation permits issued under this chapter shall remain effective until and unless voluntarily surrendered, suspended or revoked, as provided in this chapter.
(L. 1941 p. 290 § 14493f, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 26, A.L. 1992 H.B. 878)
